match.userMessage:
Cinematic wide shot in fresh modern editorial style with effortlessly cool golden hour energy, SCARLETT wearing a loose linen shirt with blonde hair lifting naturally in the breeze stands poised at the shoreline edge with weight shifted forward in quiet anticipation mid-breath smiling directly toward camera before turning to walk the wet sand, vast Bondi Beach stretches behind with gentle waves lapping the shore pale horizon surfers faint in the distance soft beige sand underfoot weathered textures visible along the promenade line, warm directional sunlight from the lowering sun bathes the entire frame in rich golden tones creating long soft shadows and luminous rim light across skin and fabric with subtle lens flare and shallow depth of field keeping foreground crisp while background ocean and sky melt into creamy bokeh, eye-level cinematic framing with natural handheld micro-movement energy lens flares and true-to-life warm color grading on 16:9 frame.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - Wide promenade
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
